hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"; if ! (cargo fmt -- --check && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test) >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CI checks failed. Run: cargo fmt -- --check && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test"}}'; fi; fi
